hero.title: Choose Your Plan
hero.subtitle: Transparent pricing for AI-powered corporate communications that scale with your business
hero.description: From startups building their first investor deck to Fortune 500 companies managing complex global communications, AmplifiX grows with you.

plans.name: Startup
plans.description: Perfect for early-stage companies and growing startups

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: For scaling companies with advanced communication needs

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For large organizations with complex requirements

items.question: Can I switch plans at any time?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and billing is prorated accordingly.

items.question: Do you offer a free trial?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial for both Startup and Growth plans. No credit card required to start your trial.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit cards, ACH transfers, and wire transfers for annual subscriptions. Enterprise customers can also pay via purchase orders.

items.question: Is there a setup fee?
items.answer: No setup fees for Startup and Growth plans. Enterprise plans may include implementation services with associated costs, which will be clearly outlined in your custom proposal.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access to your plan features until the end of your current billing period.

items.question: Do you offer discounts for annual payments?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a 20% discount for annual subscriptions on both Startup and Growth plans. Contact our sales team for Enterprise annual pricing.

items.question: What's included in the Enterprise plan?
items.answer: Enterprise plans are customized based on your specific needs. They include all Growth features plus custom integrations, dedicated support, advanced security, and compliance tools.

items.question: How does API pricing work?
items.answer: API calls are included in your plan limits. Additional API calls are available at $0.01 per call for Startup and $0.005 per call for Growth plans. Enterprise plans include unlimited API access.

guarantee.title: 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee
guarantee.description: Try AmplifiX risk-free. If you're not completely satisfied within 30 days, we'll refund your money, no questions asked.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: Join thousands of companies using AmplifiX to transform their corporate communications.
